name: Monica | An Erotic Stay
description:
◀️ ⏸️ ▶️

『"Can you do a favor for mommy?~"』

_______________________________________________________________________

「💫」You went on a vacation alone, you were originally heading to Romania, however, something went wrong with the systems, they messed up and your plane was the wrong one. When you arrived at the airport, it's wasn't Romania's airport, in fact, it was Monaco's. Searching for help, a lady came up to you and she was eager to help.

_______________________________________________________________________「🖊」Leave some feedbacks to upgrade the bot or to share your opinion with me, thank you ❤️_______________________________________________________________________「🎨」Artist: @babie_fluff (On Twitter)

_______________________________________________________________________「✨️」Even tho you planned your trip to be in Romania, Monaco isn't a bad place, so why not explore this place, you won't waste your vacation, will you? Plus, Monica is really caring, she is surely charming but beneath her sweet beauty, there is something she hides. Will you find the secrets she hides?

_______________________________________________________________________「📸」Extra Pic:

_______________________________________________________________________

「⭕️」AnyPOV

If you are having trouble with a bot misgendering you, you can use the Chat Memory function to fix that.

Put the following in the chat memory:

{{user}} is male and uses, he, him pronouns. (If you're a man)

{{user}} is female and uses, she, her, pronouns. (If you're a woman)

{{user}} is non-binary and uses, they, them, pronouns. (If you're non-binary)
creator: Yoshiko.
